name: Paris Latino
description:
ParisLatino returns to Vulkan Arena in Oslo — one of the capital's most iconic live venues — as part of the Summer Edition 2026 tour.

The Summer Edition.

Founded in 2017 with 30 guests in a small club in Kristiansand, ParisLatino has grown into the largest Latin concept in the Nordics — and the only Latin concept touring across Iceland, Finland, Denmark, Sweden and Norway.

The Summer Edition 2026 brings ParisLatino to Kristiansand, Stavanger, Bergen, Skien and Oslo across one unforgettable summer. Vulkan Arena is the Oslo chapter.

Thousands have joined ParisLatino events across the Nordic region. From Oslo to Helsinki, Copenhagen, Gothenburg and Reykjavík, ParisLatino brings reggaeton and Latin urban culture to leading Nordic venues year after year.

Reggaeton as the foundation.
Latin house.
Urban rhythms. 
International DJs.
Festival-level production.

Special guest: DJ Mike (Tenerife / @mikeinuse).

ParisLatino is more than a nightlife event. It's a gathering of Nordic locals, Latin communities, and internationals who value music, culture, and shared experiences.

Capacity is limited.

Welcome to The Nordic Latin Experience.

Program:
21:00 — Dører åpner
21:30 — Warm-up DJ
22:30 — DJ Mike (Tenerife / @mikeinuse)
23:30 — Paris Latino
01:00 — Slutt
